description_long: This is a round, medium-sized orange fruit with a smooth, slightly dimpled skin and a natural, matte finish. The surface is predominantly orange with subtle variations in hue, and there are faint, natural blemishes and markings typical of citrus fruits. A single green leaf, attached to a short, light brown stem, adds a touch of realism and freshness to the appearance. The leaf is elongated, slightly curved, and has a visible central vein, contrasting with the orange body. The fruit's shape is nearly spherical, with a slight flattening at the top and bottom. The overall look is fresh and ripe, suggesting it was recently picked from a tree.
description: A ripe, round orange fruit with a smooth orange skin, a short stem, and a single green leaf attached.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the orange's stem and attached green leaf, with the leaf extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full green leaf and the rounded orange surface, with the stem partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the uninterrupted orange skin, with the leaf and stem barely visible on the left.
description_view_3: Angled top view focusing on the stem and the base of the leaf, with the orange's surface texture clearly visible.
attribute_location_or_placement: outdoor sidewalk, park bench, street vendor cart
